positive: A vibrant, stylized pattern featuring whimsical forest creatures (foxes, deer, woodland spirits) intertwined with stylized botanical elements like ferns, mushrooms, and delicate vines. The style should be a modern, sophisticated blend of art nouveau and linocut woodblock printing. Composition must be a repeating, seamless pattern centered on the canvas. Use strong, contrasting silhouettes against a slightly distressed cream background. Color palette: deep forest greens, burnt umber, rich sapphire blue, and cream. Highly detailed, high contrast, flat vector style, perfect for all-over apparel print, clean lines, high saturation.
negative: photo, realistic, photorealism, blurry, grainy, artifact, watermarks, text, watermark, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, poor quality, ugly, logo, trademark, writing
